play_store.review: Worse over time: 1) Way more unplayable tracks now (hidden til you enable it). It's never explained why. 2) Opted-in by default to share plays with Neilson, even paid users. How do subscribers benefit from this, if at all? 3) I'm nagged to try the new widget... with a nag filling my current one. Thanks, I hate it; it doesn't work and you *broke my working one*. 4) Lossless encoding can't fix all the songs made low quality on purpose (to discourage piracy). 5) NO CHANGELOG IN PLAY 🤨
I'm facing something went wrong issue last one month... pls fix this asap because I'm buying your 3 months plan

Moving away from Premium I had been a premium member for Spotify premium from last 5 years. I did like your service and the app but unfortunately I am moving on to YT music as I had switched from Premium Duo to platinum but after I tried and try to come back to Duo the app doesn't let me come back to the plan. It felt like cheating especially after being a premium member for so long. Bye bye Spotify welcome YT music.
